programme.title: Selling Mega Mansions
programme.desc: Chef Michael and his fiancé, Jennifer, are preparing to merge their two lives by selling their two current homes; they wish to find an awesome kitchen where Michael can grow his brand and where Jennifer can hold events.

programme.title: Summer Fun Destinations
programme.desc: Just two hours north of Los Angeles is one of America's favorite summer vacation destinations, Santa Barbara; while many know it for its popular wineries, there is so much more to see and do.

programme.title: Dream Cruises
programme.desc: Explore the Mississippi River from Minnesota to the Gulf of Mexico aboard the Queen of the Mississippi, a 19th-century replica steamboat.

programme.title: Travel in Style
programme.desc: A ride down the Canal du Midi on a one of a kind boutique barge; the capital and second largest city in the Czech Republic, Prague, is home to the world's largest occupied castle.

programme.title: Private Islands
programme.desc: Host Christina Cindrich explores Fiji's magical landscape, stunning beaches, and friendly people.

programme.title: Behind the Gates
programme.desc: Four jaw-dropping Dallas estates; from countryside equestrian and French-style mansions to a dazzling high-rise penthouse.

programme.title: A Taste of Travel
programme.desc: Explorers journey to idyllic places to try local cuisine, find out what destinations have to offer and share travel trips along the way.

programme.title: 5 Star Getaways
programme.desc: This series is a sun-filled invitation to travel and visit magnificent all-inclusive 5-star resorts throughout the world, their magnificent surroundings and the exciting excursions one can do at each destination.

programme.title: Facing Waves
programme.desc: Ireland's Wild Atlantic Way, a premier destination for some of the world's top stand up paddle boarders and big wave surfers.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Most Amazing Homes
programme.desc: From magnificent and spacious to stunning architectural feats with mind-boggling budgets, these mega-mansions include everything one could ever dream of.

programme.title: Road Less Traveled
programme.desc: Jonathan visits the Slum Dog Millionaire neighborhood of Dharavi, explores the Taj Mahal Palace, and goes on a midnight search and destroy mission.

programme.title: Dream Cruises
programme.desc: Sailing from Italy around the toe of "the boot" and onward into the Greek Islands.

programme.title: A Taste of Travel (Asia)
programme.desc: In Agra, India, Lynton visits one of the Seven Wonders of the World and samples some street snacks.

programme.title: Top Travel
programme.desc: Skiing in the Andes; a wine farm.

programme.title: Travel in Style
programme.desc: The quality and life, financial perks and clean beaches are normal in the Channel Islands, N.J.; in Portofino, Italy, pastel painted houses create an illusion of grandeur.

programme.title: Blue World
programme.sub-title: St. Lawrence River, New York & Florida Keys
programme.desc: Biologists work to save sturgeon in the St. Lawrence River; coral grows in an underwater farm in Key Largo, Fla.

programme.title: Private Islands
programme.desc: Fiji's culture, beaches, and underwater activities.

programme.title: Behind the Gates
programme.desc: Epic private estates, from a $20 million French-inspired, California chateau and a sleek and modern all-glass house, to the ultimate Hollywood Hills celebrity bachelor pad.

programme.title: A Taste of Travel
programme.desc: The crew travels around the world, trying local cuisine and offering travel tips; featuring the delights of Sorrento, Italy, and the delicasies of South Africa.

programme.title: Dream Cruises
programme.desc: From the province of Assam in northeastern India, cruise down the Brahmaputra River onboard the Mahabaahu, we'll set off this Indian Dream Cruise through a country steeped in legend and mystery.

programme.title: Selling Mega Mansions
programme.desc: Young married couple AJ and Sasha are moving from Los Angeles to Aspen, Colorado to purchase their first home; AJ might prefer something more understated for his first home, while Sasha is looking for something grandiose and expansive.

programme.title: Summer Fun Destinations
programme.desc: Visiting Southern California's wine country to see why it is a good stop for fun destinations.

programme.title: Most Amazing Homes
programme.desc: From magnificent and spacious to stunning architectural feats with mind-boggling budgets, these mega-mansions include everything one could ever dream of.

programme.title: Private Islands
programme.desc: Fiji's culture, beaches, and underwater activities.

programme.title: Distant Shores
programme.desc: Visit Martinique to learn about the island's tragic past at St. Pierre.

programme.title: A Taste of Travel (Asia)
programme.desc: In Agra, India, Lynton visits one of the Seven Wonders of the World and samples some street snacks.

programme.title: Facing Waves
programme.desc: Breathtaking scenery, sparkling water and the vibrant tropical lifestyle of the Florida Keys and Key West are explored in this episode. Tour the mangroves by paddle board.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Top Travel
programme.desc: Skiing in the Andes; a wine farm.

programme.title: Find Me a Vacation Home
programme.desc: Property hunters look for luxurious vacation homes where paradise is in the backyard.

programme.title: Selling Jets
programme.desc: Paul and Joanne continue their tour of an Agusta helicopter with Leonard Goldberg; buyers Barry and Paula head back to the Pollard offices to discuss their options with Tim Pollard.

programme.title: Travel in Style
programme.desc: The quality and life, financial perks and clean beaches are normal in the Channel Islands, N.J.; in Portofino, Italy, pastel painted houses create an illusion of grandeur.

programme.title: Road Less Traveled
programme.desc: Jonathan heads straight for the Burmese border to meet the fabled Karen people.

programme.title: Selling Mega Mansions
programme.desc: Young married couple AJ and Sasha are moving from Los Angeles to Aspen, Colorado to purchase their first home; AJ might prefer something more understated for his first home, while Sasha is looking for something grandiose and expansive.

programme.title: Distant Shores
programme.desc: Visit Martinique to learn about the island's tragic past at St. Pierre.

programme.title: Boys Toys
programme.desc: Conquering a mountain and then heading to the bar for some drinks in virtual reality; strapping on a headset that takes the user to new worlds and changes the way people play games.

programme.title: Most Amazing Homes
programme.desc: From magnificent and spacious to stunning architectural feats with mind-boggling budgets, these mega-mansions include everything one could ever dream of.

programme.title: Road Less Traveled
programme.desc: Jonathan heads straight for the Burmese border to meet the fabled Karen people.

programme.title: Dream Cruises
programme.desc: A cruise through the Northwestern Mediterranean, including Italy, Malta, Spain and France.

programme.title: Top Travel
programme.desc: Easter Island's culture.

programme.title: Travel in Style
programme.desc: The capital of Scotland, Edinburgh, offers exquisite Victorian architecture at the Balmoral Hotel and the Edinburgh Castle offers spectacular views; Geneva, Switzerland is home to the Richmond Hotel with private access to lake Geneva.

programme.title: Blue World
programme.desc: Beluga whales at the Mystic Aquarium in Connecticut; a blue hole on Andros Island in the Bahamas is over 400 feet deep; spinner dolphins in Hawaii.

programme.title: Private Islands
programme.desc: Discover Jumby Bay's multi-million dollar estates off the coast of Antigua.

programme.title: Behind the Gates
programme.desc: Known for its natural beauty and eclectic citizens, the San Francisco Bay Area is home to some of the most creative and successful people in the United States; Vic Alavi tours estates in San Francisco.

programme.title: A Taste of Travel
programme.desc: Explorers journey to idyllic places to try local cuisine, find out what destinations have to offer and share travel trips along the way.

programme.title: Dream Cruises
programme.desc: This 17-deck vessel with more than 1,000 staterooms sails the Caribbean with port stops at the islands of Catalina, Tortola, Antigua, Martinique, Guadelupe and St. Martin.

programme.title: Selling Mega Mansions
programme.desc: Brody, an entrepreneur from an established family, and his wife Hanna are looking to settle down to a quieter lifestyle in beautiful Aspen Colorado.

programme.title: Most Amazing Homes
programme.desc: Three homes off the coast of California.

programme.title: Private Islands
programme.desc: Discover Jumby Bay's multi-million dollar estates off the coast of Antigua.

programme.title: Distant Shores
programme.desc: Waterway journeys including Erie Canal in the USA, Trent Severn Canal in Canada, Scotland's Crinan and Caledonian Canals and Sweden's Gota Canal.

programme.title: Facing Waves
programme.desc: Small villages, gorgeous coastlines and heart-stopping encounters with whales by sea kayak present a taste of what Newfoundland and Labrador have to offer.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Top Travel
programme.desc: Easter Island's culture.

programme.title: Find Me a Vacation Home
programme.desc: Property hunters look for luxurious vacation homes where paradise is in the backyard.

programme.title: Selling Jets
programme.desc: Rob and Aj are looking for a plane to launch their new charter business, so they turn to Gold Aviation's Leonard Goldberg for help; buyer Ken looks to Scott Oshman to help him purchase a small plane primarily for his Texas-based real estate business.

programme.title: Travel in Style
programme.desc: The capital of Scotland, Edinburgh, offers exquisite Victorian architecture at the Balmoral Hotel and the Edinburgh Castle offers spectacular views; Geneva, Switzerland is home to the Richmond Hotel with private access to lake Geneva.

programme.title: Road Less Traveled
programme.desc: Magic rituals and witch doctors await Jonathan as he trundles through the capital city of Jakarta. Later, he seeks refuge from the bizzare superstition in one of the most secluded communities in the world.

programme.title: Selling Mega Mansions
programme.desc: Brody, an entrepreneur from an established family, and his wife Hanna are looking to settle down to a quieter lifestyle in beautiful Aspen Colorado.

programme.title: Most Amazing Homes
programme.desc: Three homes off the coast of California.

programme.title: Distant Shores
programme.desc: Waterway journeys including Erie Canal in the USA, Trent Severn Canal in Canada, Scotland's Crinan and Caledonian Canals and Sweden's Gota Canal.

programme.title: Boys Toys
programme.desc: A high-speed thrill ride with the Geico race team as well as a visit to its headquarters.
